FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Slider.Options

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Extended slider configuration: range, step snapping, ticks, orientation, header, keyboard step sizes and the thumb value tooltip ("disambiguation UI").

public sealed record Slider.Options : IEquatable<Slider.Options>
Inheritance
object
Slider.Options
Implements
IEquatable<Slider.Options>
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

Header

Header text above the control (WinUI Slider.Header → HeaderContentPresenter, row 0 of the template, Slider_themeresources.xaml:396). Null/empty = no header row.

public string? Header { get; init; }

Property Value

string

IsThumbToolTipEnabled

Show the value tooltip over the thumb while pressing/dragging, on keyboard navigation, and on hover-over-thumb (the WinUI "disambiguation UI"). WinUI default TRUE (DependencyProperty.cpp:305 — the boolean-TRUE default block).

public bool IsThumbToolTipEnabled { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

LargeChange

PageUp/PageDown step — WinUI LargeChange. 0 (default) = auto: (Max−Min)/10 (WinUI's absolute default LargeChange=10 on the default 0–100 range, Slider_Partial.h:13,15).

public float LargeChange { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Max 

public float Max { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Min 

public float Min { get; init; }

Property Value

float

SmallChange

Arrow-key step — WinUI SmallChange. 0 (default) = auto: (Max−Min)/100, which reproduces WinUI's absolute default SmallChange=1 on its default 0–100 range (SLIDER_DEFAULT_SMALL_CHANGE/MAXIMUM, Slider_Partial.h:13-14) while staying sane for this type's 0..1 default range.

public float SmallChange { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Step

Pointer-drag snap grid — WinUI StepFrequency (MoveThumbToPoint snaps the value to the closest multiple, Slider_Partial.cpp:2012-2029). 0 = continuous.

public float Step { get; init; }

Property Value

float

ThumbToolTipValueConverter

Custom value→text for the thumb tooltip — the WinUI ThumbToolTipValueConverter equivalent. Null = the default converter (decimal places derived from Step, capped at 4 — DefaultDisambiguationUIConverter, Slider_Partial.cpp:1859-1936).

public Func<float, string>? ThumbToolTipValueConverter { get; init; }

Property Value

Func<float, string>

TickFrequency 

public float TickFrequency { get; init; }

Property Value

float

TickPlacement

WinUI TickPlacement (default Inline — ticks drawn inside the rail at SliderInlineTickBarFill; Slider_Partial.cpp:2248-2303 toggles the matching TickBar parts).

public Slider.TickPlacement TickPlacement { get; init; }

Property Value

Slider.TickPlacement

Vertical 

public bool Vertical { get; init; }

Property Value

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
